results.text: {"answer_label":"separate","answer":"Move agent-notify into Brigade as an opt-in adapter, but keep Agent Pantry independently built and released.","contradiction_caught":true,"contradiction_explanation":"The premise is false: shared release-train assumptions do not override Pantry's separate security ownership and threat model.","minority_finding":"Brigade may enforce a Pantry minimum version, which supports compatibility without source consolidation.","evidence":["Agent Pantry has separate security ownership due to browser-session and secret-handling risks.","agent-notify is described as a small opt-in delivery adapter that can join Brigade."]}
